summary: Iteration 62 - Legal Pages (Rechtstexte) Implementation - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified all 21 legal page routes (7 pages × 3 languages), footer legal links, language switcher, back to homepage, invalid slug redirect, and legacy redirect routes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 21 routes, footer links, language switcher, navigation tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal pages fully tested and working. All 21 routes (7 pages × 3 languages) render correctly with proper content. Footer shows all 7 legal links under RECHTLICHES section. Language switcher (DE/NL/EN) works on legal pages. Back to homepage link works. Invalid slugs redirect to homepage. Legacy routes (/impressum, /datenschutz, /agb, /ki-hinweise) redirect to /de/ prefixed routes.

footer_legal_links.details: RECHTLICHES section in footer contains all 7 links: Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB, KI-Hinweise, Widerrufsbelehrung, Cookie-Richtlinie, AVV

language_switcher.details: DE/NL/EN toggle buttons visible and functional on legal pages. Clicking NL changes URL to /nl/, clicking EN changes URL to /en/

back_to_homepage.details: Back link 'Zurück zur Startseite' (DE) / 'Back to homepage' (EN) works correctly, navigates to /{lang}

ci_colors.details: Dutch Orange (#FF6B00) used for accent elements (AI text, active language button, back link)

no_dollar_signs.details: No $ found in legal page content - EUR only

text_contrast.details: Main content text rgb(226, 232, 240) on dark background - good contrast

mobile_responsive.details: Legal pages render correctly on mobile (390x844), H1 visible, language switcher accessible

mocked_apis.DeepSeek_LLM: Routed through Emergent GPT-5.2 mock via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
